section_blurb: Installers and core packages. All Adelphos software downloads in one place — Revit add-ins, AutoCAD bundles, desktop services.

items.title: Adelphos Revit Add-in
items.blurb: Bundles the Revit Copilot, Adelphos, and the 163 commands as a single .addin install.

items.title: Adelphos AutoCAD MEP Bundle
items.blurb: Adelphos connectors for AutoCAD MEP, including drawing export and clash export tooling.

items.title: Document Controller (desktop)
items.blurb: Standalone install of the Document Controller service. Watches your folders, syncs to the dashboard.

items.title: Adelphos Chat (desktop)
items.blurb: Native desktop client for the Adelphos agent. Runs without a browser, supports offline drafting.
